search_terms_used: marathon training physiology performance determinants meta-analysis pubmed
marathon preparation evidence based training volume optimal pubmed
marathon performance predictors training anthropometric pubmed
marathon pacing strategies systematic review pubmed
marathon training intensity distribution recreational elite pubmed
marathon training plan benchmarks analysis pubmed
coverage_notes: Strong coverage with 5 meta-analyses/systematic reviews. Training volume dose-response (Doherty 2020 meta-regression), volume/frequency interactions (Yamaguchi 2023), long run + injury (Fokkema 2020), training plan benchmarks (Knopp 2024), intensity distribution across 119K runners (Muniz-Pumares 2025), pacing strategies (Sha 2024 SR), tapering (Bosquet 2007, Wang 2023, Smyth 2021), strength training (Llanos-Lagos 2024), performance determinants (Keogh 2020), in-race nutrition (Hansen 2014). Good mix of elite and recreational.

papers.title: An evaluation of the training determinants of marathon performance: A meta-analysis with meta-regression
papers.journal: Journal of Science and Medicine in Sport
papers.notes: Meta-analysis with meta-regression of 85 studies examining dose-response relationships between training behaviors and marathon finish time.

papers.title: Effects of tapering on performance in endurance athletes: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed and meta-analyzed 14 studies on tapering strategies evaluating effects of taper duration, volume reduction magnitude, and intensity maintenance on performance.

papers.title: Effects of tapering on performance: a meta-analysis
papers.journal: Medicine and Science in Sports and Exercise
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed 27 studies to determine optimal taper characteristics (duration, volume reduction, intensity, frequency) for maximizing competition performance.

papers.title: The Effect of Strength Training Methods on Middle-Distance and Long-Distance Runners' Athletic Performance: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed and meta-analyzed effects of different strength training methods on middle- and long-distance runners' performance including running economy and time trials.

papers.title: Pacing strategies in marathons: A systematic review
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed 39 studies on marathon pacing strategies across performance levels, sex, age groups, and environmental conditions.

papers.title: The Training Intensity Distribution of Marathon Runners Across Performance Levels
papers.notes: Analyzed training intensity distribution across 119,452 marathon runners of varying performance levels, quantifying zone-specific volume and its relationship to finish time.

papers.title: Interactions between monthly training volume, frequency and running distance per workout on marathon time
papers.notes: Investigated interactions between monthly training volume, frequency, and per-session distance as predictors of marathon finish time in 494 recreational male runners.

papers.title: Training for a (half-)marathon: Training volume and longest endurance run related to performance and running injuries
papers.journal: Scandinavian Journal of Medicine & Science in Sports
papers.notes: Prospectively followed 997 runners through marathon/half-marathon preparation examining associations between training volume, longest run, finish time, and injury incidence.

papers.title: Longer Disciplined Tapers Improve Marathon Performance for Recreational Runners
papers.journal: Frontiers in Sports and Active Living
papers.notes: Analyzed taper behavior of 158,000+ recreational marathon runners to quantify the relationship between taper duration, discipline, and finish-time outcomes.

papers.title: The Determinants of Marathon Performance: An Observational Analysis of Anthropometric, Pre-race and In-race Variables
papers.notes: Measured anthropometric, pre-race training, and in-race pacing variables in 260 marathon runners to determine which factors explain greatest variance in performance.

papers.title: Quantitative Analysis of 92 12-Week Sub-elite Marathon Training Plans
papers.notes: Quantitatively analyzed 92 published 12-week marathon training plans for sub-elite runners, extracting weekly volume, intensity distribution, long run prescription, and periodization patterns.

papers.title: Improved marathon performance by in-race nutritional strategy intervention
papers.journal: International Journal of Sport Nutrition and Exercise Metabolism
papers.notes: Compared marathon finish times between runners using a prescribed in-race nutritional strategy versus self-selected nutrition during the same event.
